channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Investigative journalist reports on the abuse inside ICE's largest detention facility
item.description: The New Yorker writer Jonathan Blitzer says thousands of people are being held in tents in the El Paso desert, where inhumane conditions have become a...

item.title: Environmental groups sue government to stop a big change to the Endangered Species Act
item.description: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in t...

item.title: Some international artists are skipping U.S. tours. Others may follow suit
item.description: The visa process for visiting artists has always been complicated and expensive. Under the current administration, it's gotten significantly worse.

item.title: Inflation slows sharply, but sustainability remains uncertain
item.description: Annual inflation fell to 3.5% in June, down from May's high, but renewed conflict with Iran could drive prices up again.
